summary: TWO_COLUMN: ValueTracker k advances powers z^k of a complex number on the left ComplexPlane; always_redraw spiral path connects z^0,...,z^⌊k⌋ as chords plus a smooth moving dot at the current k. Two phases: |z|=0.88 (inward spiral) then |z|=1.06 (outward). Right column live |z|, arg(z), k, |z^k|, arg(z^k), and z^k value.
